steps.t: There is a horse in Ost Guruth that you feel compelled to seek out. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to the Horsefields…
The rare herb sought by Radagast's horse only grows in places of high elevation. The only place high enough for miles around Ost Guruth is the summit …
Radagast's horse is found in Ost Guruth. <rgb=#FF0000>If defeated or time expires, you will return to the horsefields.</rgb>
